summary: All 10 round-1 fixes verified against upstream source (SHA 1f1d21d). No regressions or collateral damage detected.

verification.note: Broken link `feedback-channel.md` replaced with `which-overlay.md`. Parenthetical clarifies '로딩·피드백 채널 선택 기준 포함' so AI consumers understand the redirect.

Token `$dimension.x40` replaced with literal `160px`. Comment now explicitly documents 'YAML 원문 리터럴 — $dimension 토큰으로 치환 없이 그대로 사용'. Matches upstream content-placeholder.yaml line 31 (`maxWidth: 160px`).

Standalone Asset behavior now correctly documents fallback to default preset, not failure. Matches upstream ContentPlaceholder.tsx line 49: `contentPlaceholderAssetPresetMap[parentProps?.type ?? "default"]`. Anti-pattern section (line 157) also updated consistently.
All 7 compound variant names now used correctly: neutralWeak, positiveWeak, informativeWeak, warningWeak, warningSolid, criticalWeak, criticalSolid. Matches upstream inline-banner.yaml.

Pressed state now clearly scoped to Root-as-button via asChild. Explicit sub-section 'root pressed 의 실제 적용 범위' added with 3 bullets explaining div-default, asChild-button, and CloseButton interaction. Matches upstream page-banner.css selector `.seed-page-banner__root:is(button):is(:hover/:active)`.

PrefixIcon guidance corrected. Anatomy note (line 48) and YAML mapping table (line 59) both explain React namespace does NOT export PrefixIcon wrapper; user must use `className="seed-prefix-icon"` manually. Verified via grep — only TextField/Chip/Snackbar/FieldButton/Icon export PrefixIcon; PageBanner does not.
`indeterminate (true/false)` claim removed. Now reads 'value 생략=스피너, value=number=진행률' — value-based mode switching only. Matches upstream React API (no `indeterminate` prop).
Default textStyle now correctly documented as recipe default `t5Regular`. Citation includes upstream path `packages/css/recipes/text.mjs` — verified as `defaultVariant.textStyle = 't5Regular'`.

Section order now follows 1F pattern: 언제 쓰나 → Anatomy → Variants → Motion/Base 토큰 → Props → States → 합성 규칙 → 접근성 → Anti-patterns → 예제. `## States` section added (line 87) with non-interactive note — exact structure proposed in round 1 fix. Matches divider.md/avatar.md/badge.md 1F conventions.
Decision tree leaf corrected. Line 20 now reads '섹션 내부·리스트 근처의 정적 안내 → Callout (InlineBanner는 deprecated — PageBanner 는 페이지 최상단 고정이라 여기 오지 않음)'. Routes in-section notices to Callout, not PageBanner.

regression_scan.broken_links: none — `feedback-channel` no longer referenced anywhere in references/
regression_scan.invented_api: none — `indeterminate (true/false)` and short variant names no longer appear
regression_scan.markdown_integrity: all tables/formatting intact; section anchors preserved
